proof_boundary: This artifact proves the exact scalar reduction and sufficient constant comparison. It does not prove the curvature ceiling, the order-five analytic tail, all-shift order five, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: The rigorous endpoint prefix already proves order-five entry through n=316.
The stable order-five sign is exactly one scalar logarithmic inequality.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact algebra inside the completed positive lower cone.

rows.claim: The scalar target is a difference of adjacent log-curvatures of F and d.
The existing scaled-defect anchor supplies an order-one-over-k logarithmic buffer.
The coarse order-one-over-k-squared curvature ceiling lies strictly below the defect buffer on the complete tail.
The scalar curvature ceiling would prove the complete missing lambda=-100 order-five tail.
rows.proof_boundary: Conditional on the displayed scalar ceiling only.

rows.claim: Composing the prefix, tail, uniform eventual theorem, and cooperative flow would complete order five through lambda zero.
rows.formula: prefix 0<=n<=316 plus the curvature tail => H_(5,n)(-100)>0 for every n>=0; the completed uniform tail and cooperative flow then imply H_(5,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=0 and -100<=lambda<=0
rows.proof_boundary: Conditional; not PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: Prove one zeta-specific stable log-curvature ceiling on the analytic tail.
